name: Mineral salts medium (MM) + quadruple carbon sources, C=4 (SuperCC GSMM simulation) (PMC12858907)
organism_scope: Six keystone bacterial strains from TC/OTC-acclimated aquatic microbial consortia (SuperCC community FBA models)
description: Mineral salts medium (MM) + quadruple carbon sources, C=4 (SuperCC GSMM simulation) — a minimal medium extracted from Ruan et al. (2025). Mapped to BiGG from the paper's stated composition.

provenance.citation: Ruan et al. Potentiators empower synthetic microbiomes as silent guardians against co-contamination. Nature Communications (2025). DOI: 10.1038/s41467-025-67953-5. [PMC12858907]
provenance.notes: Full recipe recovered from the primary literature: base medium 'Minimal (mineral salts) medium MM' (Supplementary Information / Supplementary Methods of the source paper itself: 'Potentiators empower synthetic microbiomes as silent guardians against co-contamination', Nature Communications (2025), DOI 10.1038/s41467-025-67953-5; PMC12858907. The MM recipe is defined verbatim in the Supplementary Methods (Media section).). Extracted from the primary paper (snippet: mixed carbon sources (25 mmol/g
provenance.verification_evidence: MM with 25 mmol/gDW each of glucose, citrate, acetate, and fumarate (quadruple carbon sources, C = 4). ... Except for the essential nitrogen source (NH4+) which was set to 100 mmol/gDW, the contents of all other inorganic substances without carbon (C) or nitrogen (N) were set to 1000 mmol/gDW.
provenance.recipe_evidence: MM base (verbatim, Supplementary Methods): 'The minimal medium medium (MM) consisted of 1 g/L NaCl, 1 g/L NH4Cl, 1.5 g/L K2HPO4, 0.5 g/L KH2PO4, and 0.2 g/L MgSO4·7H2O.' Carbon-source configuration (verbatim): 'C = 4 condition: Four carbon sources were included, each at 25 mmol to ensure balanced representation: 25 mmol glucose ... 25 mmol citrate ... 25 mmol acetate ... and 25 mmol fumarate ...' Simulation flux settings (verbatim): 'While NH4+ still had an LB of 100 mmol/gDW, all other organic substances had an LB of 0 mmol/gDW, and all other inorganic substances without C/N had an LB of 1000
provenance.base_medium_reference: Supplementary Information / Supplementary Methods of the source paper itself: 'Potentiators empower synthetic microbiomes as silent guardians against co-contamination', Nature Communications (2025), DOI 10.1038/s41467-025-67953-5; PMC12858907. The MM recipe is defined verbatim in the Supplementary Methods (Media section).

components.name: acetate
components.role: carbon (simulated exchange flux bound; C=4 condition)

components.role: carbon (simulated exchange flux bound; C=4 condition)

components.role: carbon (simulated exchange flux bound; C=4 condition)

components.role: carbon (simulated exchange flux bound; C=4 condition)

components.name: oxygen
components.role: electron acceptor (aerobic; O2 uptake allowed, UB of O2 exchange set to 0 = secretion blocked)
